text:
({ row }) => h(UButton, {
  'icon': row.getIsPinned() ? 'i-lucide-pin-off' : 'i-lucide-pin',
  'color': row.getIsPinned() ? 'primary' : 'neutral',
  'variant': 'ghost',
  'aria-label': row.getIsPinned() ? 'Unpin row' : 'Pin row to top',
  'onClick': () => row.pin(row.getIsPinned() ? false : 'top')
})
